## Description

Brief summary of this PR. What problem does it solve? What feature does it add?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Infrastructure/DevOps change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include steps to reproduce if applicable.

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows organization standards (pre-commit passes locally)
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Added comments for complex logic
- [ ] Updated documentation (README, docs/, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] Tests pass locally and in CI
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Backwards compatible (or documented breaking change)
- [ ] Version bump (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials

## Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- Add screenshots for UI changes -->

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Improves performance (describe)
- [ ] Minor performance impact (describe)
- [ ] Potential performance concern (describe investigation needed)

## Deployment Notes

Any special considerations for deployment? Environment variables? Database migrations? Feature flags?

---

**Reviewers:** Please verify:
- [ ] Code quality and style
- [ ] Tests are adequate
- [ ] No security concerns
- [ ] Backward compatibility
- [ ] Documentation is complete
